title: 13 February, 2023 DÜİYES Exam Announcement
content:
Announcements

Details

Date: 09 February 2023

13 February, 2023 DÜİYES Exam Announcement

13 February 2023 English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Click here

for DUIYES OUTLINE

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Programme 2022-2023 Academic Year Fall Semester DÜİYES Procedurs and Principles

Dear Students,

2022-2023 Fall Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on

Monday, February 13, 2023

and will be invigilated face to face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions and the students are required to attend

both sessions.

Session 1:

10:00 - 11:40

Session 2:

12:00 - 13:00

●The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at

09.30

so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

●Students must have a valid ID with photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You need to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

●The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil, and an eraser.

●DÜİYES results will be announced on

February 17, 2023.

Paylaş
